title: Mildly Spicy Venezuelan Beef Paella
description: A smoky, light, one-pot Venezuelan dish featuring apple juice, ideal for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic before adding to the pan

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing the chorizo and beef

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chorizo and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the tomato paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the apple juice, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the paella from the heat and let rest, covered, for 5 minutes before serving.
